message:
Fix Sigma operator directory handling to load all rules

Split monitor_state::update() into two functions to fix a bug where only
the last file's rules were retained when processing directories. The issue
was that update() called std::exchange() on every recursive call, clearing
previously loaded rules. Now update() handles the exchange and comparison
logic once, while load_rules() handles recursive traversal without clearing.

This ensures all rules from all files in a directory are properly loaded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
